subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! At this hour the gate of utterance hath been opened, turning unto thee. Therefore render thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی قد فتح فیهذا الحین باب البیان مقبلا الیک و لتشکر ربک العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
